title: OpenPalm SetupConfig
description: Structured configuration for the OpenPalm setup wizard. Defines connections, model assignments, channels, services, and security settings needed for first-time installation or reconfiguration.

owner.description: Optional owner identity for this OpenPalm instance.

name.description: Display name of the instance owner.

email.description: Email address of the instance owner.

adminToken.description: Admin API authentication token. Used to authenticate CLI and admin UI requests.

connections.description: LLM provider connections available to the instance. Must contain at least one entry.

userId.description: User ID for the memory service. Alphanumeric and underscores only. Defaults to 'default_user' if omitted.

channels.description: Optional channel configurations. Keys are channel identifiers (e.g. 'chat', 'discord', 'api'). Values can be a boolean to enable (true) or skip (false) installation, or a credential object.

oneOf.description: Enable (true) or disable (false) this channel with default settings.

services.description: Optional service configurations. Keys are service identifiers (e.g. 'admin', 'ollama'). Values can be a boolean to enable (true) or skip (false) installation, or a config object.

oneOf.description: Enable (true) or disable (false) this service with default settings.

SetupConnection.description: An LLM provider connection with endpoint and credentials.

id.description: Unique connection identifier. Must start with a letter or digit; allows A-Z, a-z, 0-9, underscore, and hyphen.

name.description: Human-readable display name for this connection.

provider.description: Provider identifier. Must be a recognized provider from the wizard scope. 'ollama-instack' is an internal alias used by the CLI to route Ollama connections to the in-stack Ollama service container.

baseUrl.description: Base URL for the provider API endpoint. Can be empty for cloud providers that use default URLs.

apiKey.description: API key for authentication. Optional for local providers (e.g. Ollama, LM Studio) that do not require authentication.

SetupConfigAssignments.description: Model capability assignments mapping connections and models to system roles.

llm.description: Primary LLM assignment for the system.

connectionId.description: ID of the connection to use for LLM inference. Must reference a connection in the connections array.

model.description: Model identifier for the primary LLM (e.g. 'gpt-4o', 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514').

smallModel.description: Optional smaller/faster model for lightweight tasks (e.g. memory extraction).

embeddings.description: Embedding model assignment for the memory subsystem.

connectionId.description: ID of the connection to use for embeddings. Must reference a connection in the connections array.

embeddingDims.description: Embedding vector dimensions. Auto-detected from known models if omitted.

tts.description: Optional text-to-speech assignment. Can be an engine name string, an object with engine details, or null to disable.

stt.description: Optional speech-to-text assignment. Can be an engine name string, an object with engine details, or null to disable.

VoiceAssignment.description: Detailed voice engine assignment with optional connection and model.

connectionId.description: Optional connection ID if the engine requires an API connection.

model.description: Optional model identifier for the voice engine.

ChannelCredentials.description: Channel configuration with optional credentials. Supports Discord, Slack, and custom channel fields.

enabled.description: Whether this channel is enabled. Defaults to true if the channel entry exists.

registerCommands.description: Whether to register Discord slash commands on startup.

allowedGuilds.description: Comma-separated list of allowed Discord guild IDs.

allowedRoles.description: Comma-separated list of allowed Discord role IDs.

allowedUsers.description: Comma-separated list of allowed user IDs.

blockedUsers.description: Comma-separated list of blocked user IDs.

allowedChannels.description: Comma-separated list of allowed Slack channel IDs.

ServiceConfig.description: Service configuration with an enabled flag and optional extra settings.
